specs.notes: Generic catalog title with no brand hint or model code. Searched 'U-Shape Height Adjust Desk' on Global Furniture Group, OTG, and BBI's own site. BBI's product page (https://www.brantbusinessinteriors.com/products/u-shape-height-adjust-desk) only lists overall size (72"W x 102"D) and 'Quick Ship' — no manufacturer, model code, finishes, materials, or warranty are published. Likely a BBI-assembled configuration (possibly Global Zira or a generic height-adjust base + laminate U-shape shell, based on similar dealer listings like Carroll's 'Global Zira U-Shape Set-Up with Adjustable-Height Desk'), but cannot confirm without a SKU. Recommend BBI supply the underlying manufacturer/model before enriching.
